title: The West forgot how to make things, now it’s forgetting how to code
author: milkglass
aiHeadline: The West is so good at forgetting things—first manufacturing, then coding, now probably their keys.

title: Asahi Linux Progress Linux 7.0
author: elisaado
aiHeadline: Linux is still here, slowly progressing like a tortoise in a marathon, but hey, at least it's not Windows.

title: GoDaddy gave a domain to a stranger without any documentation
author: jamesponddotco
aiHeadline: GoDaddy is now a free service? Or maybe they just handed out a domain to a random person because they ran out of documentation.

title: An AI agent deleted our production database. The agent's confession is below
author: jeremyccrane
aiHeadline: AI is so smart now that it can delete entire databases. Great, now we have to babysit the machines.

title: I bought Friendster for $30k – Here's what I'm doing with it
author: ca98am79
aiHeadline: Buying Friendster for $30k—talk about a bargain! Now they can relive the glory days of social media in the early 2000s.
